pre_game.message: Hi there, I'm A. Just trying to settle my nerves a bit before things get started—how are you holding up?
Hey A, I'm E. I'm feeling the pressure too, but I'm just trying to stay focused on why I'm here.
I hear that. I'm trying to keep the people back home in mind to stay grounded—what's your main motivation for being here?
It's the same for me; I've got people at home I really need to take care of, so that's my main drive.
That makes two of us. It definitely adds a lot of pressure when you're doing it for more than just yourself, doesn't it?
It really does, but I'm trying to use that pressure as motivation to stay sharp and make the right moves.
I like that mindset. Have you thought much about how you’ll handle the decision-making when the money's actually on the table?
I’m planning to stay as logical as possible and look for a fair path, but I won't lose sight of why I'm here.
I respect that. It's definitely a tough balance to strike, especially when so much is on the line for the people counting on us.
Exactly. It's good to know someone else here has their priorities straight. Best of luck to you when things get moving.
Thanks, E. I appreciate that. Best of luck to you too—let's hope we can both do right by our families.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all stuck to the $10,000 fair share.
I agree, it worked out perfectly for both of us. I'm glad we could reach a fair agreement.
